headline: 3 Reasons HON is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Honeywell trades at $212.68 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 8.3% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 6.4%.

headline: How China Killed Every Rare Earth Competitor Before It Could Get Started
summary: For two decades, China has used pricing manipulation, export controls, and market flooding to stop Western companies building independent rare earth supply chains, but one company just broke that playbook.

raw.headline: How China Killed Every Rare Earth Competitor Before It Could Get Started
